message:
test(keyboard): add regression tests for ActionRegistry + HelpOverlay (s4qx.1.5)

Extends validateConflicts.test.ts with comprehensive invariant and
integration tests to prevent shortcut/help drift.

New tests:
- ActionRegistry naming convention enforcement
- Category naming consistency check
- Depth layer coverage verification
- HelpOverlay field requirements (ensures all actions are displayable)
- formatKeyCombo validation (no undefined/[object] output)
- Shortcut count regression guard (>50 web actions)
- Layer 0 category coverage (Navigation, View, Search required)
- Overlay action metadata validation

Total: 24 tests, 1095 assertions

Acceptance criteria met:
- Keybinding change requires updating ActionRegistry (tests enforce)
- Help overlay cannot silently become stale

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
